description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible just below and to the left of the center of the reticle. The background appears to show an indistinct mountain range. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B9
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a redacted still image, derived from a U.S. military system in late 2025, to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO). The monochrome, grainy image displays a central crosshair reticle with a small, dark, circular object visible just below and to the left of its center. The background appears to show an indistinct mountain range. The operator reported being unable to positively identify the UAP, and no accompanying mission report was provided. The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.
reported_object_description: A small, dark, circular object is visible just below and to the left of the center of the reticle.
bust_reasoning: The document provides only a description of a 'small, dark, circular object' from a single optical sensor, with no kinematic data, no corroborating witnesses beyond an 'operator,' and no further context. This extreme lack of detail places it firmly in the highest range for mundane explanations, as there is nothing to resist a prosaic interpretation. The photo's internal timestamp (1999) also suggests it's a very old observation, further reducing its potential for anomalous significance without additional context.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B9 - Page 1

[redacted]

[redacted] [redacted]

[Crosshair overlay with horizontal scale: 15 10 5 0 5 10 15]

[redacted] [redacted]

[redacted] [redacted]

12/31/99 18:10:26
cover_up_reasoning: The provided document text is almost entirely redacted, with multiple instances of '[redacted]' obscuring what would presumably be the descriptive content and context of the photo. This goes far beyond routine redaction of names or boilerplate and indicates substantial concealment of the incident's details. The document is essentially just a title, a timestamp, and redaction blocks.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年末向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一张经过删节的静态图像，该图像源自美国军事系统。该单色、颗粒状图像显示一个中心十字线分划板，其中心下方偏左位置可见一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体。背景似乎显示一片模糊的山脉。操作员报告无法明确识别该UAP，且未提供随附任务报告。图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而不正确。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体位于分划板中心下方偏左位置可见。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅提供了一个来自单一光学传感器的“小型、黑暗、圆形物体”的描述，无运动学数据，除“操作员”外无其他佐证目击者，亦无进一步背景信息。这种极度缺乏细节的情况使其极有可能归因于普通解释，因为没有任何信息可以排除平淡无奇的解释。该照片的内部时间戳（1999年）也表明这是一次非常久远的观测，在缺乏额外背景信息的情况下，进一步降低了其异常意义的可能性。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 所提供的文件文本几乎完全经过删节，包含多处“[已删节]”字样，遮盖了推测为照片的描述性内容和背景信息。这远远超出了对姓名或通用文本的常规删节，表明对事件细节进行了实质性隐瞒。该文件实质上仅包含标题、时间戳和删节块。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO
Report included a still image derived from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
No accompanying mission report was provided
Operator was unable to positively identify the UAP
Date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像
原始图像经过删节处理
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而不正确
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: A small, dark, circular object without described kinematics is highly susceptible to being an optical anomaly within the camera system itself.
Distant bird or insect: A small, dark, circular object could easily be a bird or insect, especially if out of focus or silhouetted against the sky, given the single optical sensor and lack of scale.
Small piece of airborne debris: Wind-blown trash, a leaf, or other small detritus could appear as a small, dark circle, particularly if observed at a distance or with limited resolution.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：一个无描述运动学特征的小型、黑暗、圆形物体极易是相机系统内部的光学异常。
远处的鸟类或昆虫：考虑到单一光学传感器和缺乏比例尺，一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体很容易是一只鸟或昆虫，尤其是在失焦或以天空为背景形成剪影时。
小型空中碎片：被风吹动的垃圾、树叶或其他小型碎屑可能呈现为一个小型、黑暗的圆形，尤其是在远距离或分辨率有限的情况下观察时。
cover_up_indicators: Vast majority of the document's descriptive content is redacted
cover_up_indicators_zh: 多处“[已删节]”字样遮盖内容
文件绝大部分描述性内容被删节
